title: andropogon ingratus
intro: Andropogon ingratus, also known as vetiver grass, is a perennial grass native to India and Sri Lanka, characterized by its long, thin, and fragrant roots. The medicinal properties of vetiver grass include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural antiseptic. The health benefits of using vetiver grass include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and soothing skin irritations. Vetiver grass can be prepared as an herbal tea, essential oil, or dried root, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
